messages.content: Return only a RootCauseBlueprint v1-lite JSON object.
Analyze OpenBLAS dgemv_2048x2048 function dgemv_n using the supplied fixture evidence.

meta.title: Yuansheng Trace Root Cause Diagnosis Report Lite

section1_basic_info.target_hardware: RV64 target; the exact hardware model is unavailable

section2_summary.anomaly_conclusion: The retained RV64 evidence identifies dgemv_n as the rank 001 hotspot, with IPC 0.333535 and 55 annotate samples, but it has no AArch64 baseline.

3_1_metric_evidence.anomaly_note: The recorded RV64 summary reports 178437499 ns; no comparable AArch64 value is present.
The recorded RV64 summary reports IPC 0.333535; no comparable AArch64 value is present.
The recorded RV64 summary reports an LLC load miss rate of 82.031%; no comparable AArch64 value is present.

3_2_hotspot_evidence.note: The retained annotate file contains 55 samples and attributes all local samples to one loop-counter instruction; this identifies the function but is not enough to isolate the underlying bottleneck.

3_3_code_knowledge_evidence.evidence_explanation: The fixture contains disassembly and metrics but no traceable source location, source-code evidence, or Pattern catalog.

section4_root_cause.reasoning: Low IPC, a high LLC load miss rate, and concentration in dgemv_n justify further investigation, but the small annotate sample and missing cross-architecture baseline do not distinguish memory pressure, sampling attribution, or another cause.
alternative_explanations: The annotate attribution may place samples on the loop-counter instruction even when nearby vector loads or arithmetic dominate execution time.
The observed metrics may reflect system or collection conditions rather than a stable implementation bottleneck.

section5_risks_and_gaps.human_review_focus: Confirm the target hardware, collect a same-version AArch64 baseline and more samples, then map dgemv_n to reviewed source before selecting an optimization.

section6_agent4_actions.recommended_first_action: Collect a larger annotate sample and a same-version AArch64 comparison, then have a human review the evidenced dgemv_n loop.
section6_agent4_actions.recommended_verification: Repeat the same benchmark with controlled inputs and compare duration, throughput, IPC, cache behavior, and annotate distribution across RV64 and AArch64.

section7_final_verdict.block_reason: The evidence lacks an AArch64 baseline, target hardware identity, source mapping, Pattern catalog, and enough annotate samples for an optimization handoff.
